calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Continued To Aug-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Hussein Saffouri, Esq. appeared for plaintiff R&B Cellars, Inc., and with plaintiff Kevin Brown, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Christopher Frank Wine Group, a general partnership, or Christopher Enis, an individual.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Frank Kennedy was filed on May 27, 2009.
Defaults were entered against defendant Christopher Frank Wine Group, a general partnership, and Christopher Enis, an individual, on January 28, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs R&B Cellars, Inc. and Kevin Brown, and against the Defaulted Defendants Christopher Frank Wine Group, a general partnership, and Christopher Enis, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $52,698.00 for plaintiff R&B Cellars, Inc.
Prejudgment Interest - $8902.00 for plaintiff R&B Cellars, Inc.
Damages/Principal - $8,000.00 for plaintiff Kevin Brown.
Prejudgment Interest - $511.00 for plaintiff Kevin Brown.
Attorney's Fees - $18,390.00.
Costs - $538.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $89,039.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than May 29, 2009.
